question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/main.go -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: ConstructionSubmit()] Can an unprivileged external user flood the /construction/submit endpoint with a high volume of concurrent requests containing valid hex-encoded signed transactions, exhausting the sdkClient connection pool and causing all subsequent legitimate gossip submissions to fail with ErrTransactionSubmissionFailed?
